title: Software Engineer
description:
Founded in 2014, Remesh has raised over $65 million to develop a platform enabling live conversation with your audience at scale, using AI to analyze and organize their responses in real-time. The company operates within the $70+ billion insights industry.

Engineers will develop and maintain features using modern AI-assisted development workflows, collaborating with product managers and cross-functional teams. The position emphasizes transitioning toward an AI-first development workflow, leveraging tools like Claude Code, Cursor, and similar AI coding assistants.

Core Responsibilities:
- Writing, maintaining, and testing code with AI-assisted tools
- Debugging and resolving issues using AI-augmented analysis
- Collaborating on scalable software solutions integrating third-party APIs and LLMs
- Building and integrating AI agents and agentic workflows
- Contributing to AI-first development practices

Minimum Qualifications:
- 3-5 years professional software development experience
- 3+ years JavaScript or TypeScript proficiency
- 2+ years proficiency in Python, Ruby, Java, Go, or Rust
- Experience with AI-assisted development tools
- 2+ years with web technologies and testing best practices
- Strong critical thinking for evaluating AI-generated code
- Cloud platform experience (GCP, AWS, or Azure)

Preferred Qualifications:
- 5+ years development experience
- AI agents and agentic systems experience
- Python and Django expertise
- Kubernetes and Docker knowledge
- React experience
- RAG patterns and vector database understanding

Benefits: Four-day work week, medical/dental/vision, $500 WFH allowance, $150 monthly stipend, 28 days PTO, 401(k), equity, sabbatical leave.
